title: Nilo (disambiguation)
content:
'''Nilo''' can refer to:

==Legends==
*'''[[Nilo (Imperial)]]''', [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] stationed on [[Garos IV]]
*'''[[Nilo (Rodisar)]]''', [[Rodisar]] [[General/Legends|general]] and [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiator]] in [[the Cauldron]]
*'''[[Nilos]]''', [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] in the [[InterStellar Regulators]]
*'''[[Nilo (clone commando)]]''', [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Commando/Legends|Commando]] and [[Clone Captain|captain]] of [[Tark Squad]]

==Real world==
*'''[[Nilo Rodis-Jamero]]''', assistant art director of visual effects for [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']] and costume designer for [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']]

{{Disambig}}

|de=Nilo
}}
